FileManager.//EditableExtensions: Optional. When set, REPLACES the built-in editable (viewable/editable) text extensions. Leave empty to keep the defaults.
FileManager.//AdditionalEditableExtensions: Optional. Extra editable text extensions ADDED on top of the built-in defaults.
FileManager.//AdditionalBlockedNames: Security (additive only). Extra protected file names that can never be viewed/edited/renamed/deleted. Built-in defaults (web.config, appsettings*.json, .env) can never be removed.
FileManager.//AdditionalDangerousWriteExtensions: Security (additive only). Extra server-executable/dangerous extensions blocked from create/write/rename (RCE guard). Built-in defaults (.cshtml/.razor/.aspx/.php/.exe...) can never be removed.
FileManager.//Roots: Optional multi-root 'Locations'. When EMPTY, the File Manager keeps its single-root behaviour (admins -> content root, others -> web root). When set, it shows one card per location. Path is absolute or relative to the content root. AdminOnly (default true) restricts a location to administrators.
